```
V = TypeVar('V')
E = TypeVar('E')
W = TypeVar('W')

class InMemoryWeightedPath(Generic[V, E, W]):
    def __init__(self, start: V, goal: V, weight_operations: W, edge: E):
        self.start = start
        self.goal = goal
        self.weight_operations = weight_operations
        self.edge = edge
        self.connections: List[Tuple[V, E, V]] = []

    def add_connection_in_tail(self, from_vertex: V, edge: E, to_vertex: V):
        self.connections.append((from_vertex, edge, to_vertex))
```
